CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt32, config String, fqdn String);
SELECT displayName() AS display_name_result FROM test_table WHERE id = 1;
SELECT displayName() AS display_name_result FROM test_table WHERE id = 2;
SELECT displayName() AS display_name_result FROM test_table WHERE id = 3;
WITH (SELECT if(config != '', config, fqdn) FROM test_table WHERE id = 1) AS display_name FROM test_table;
SELECT id, if(config != '', config, fqdn) AS display_name FROM test_table WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE fqdn != '') ORDER BY id;
CREATE TABLE nested_test_table (user_id UInt32, display_config String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY user_id;
SELECT displayName() AS global_display_name FROM nested_test_table;
SELECT user_id, displayName() AS global_display_name, (SELECT displayName() FROM nested_test_table WHERE user_id = t.user_id) AS user_specific_display_name FROM nested_test_table AS t;
CREATE TABLE subquery_test (test_id UInt32, subdata String);
SELECT displayName() AS display_name FROM (SELECT * FROM subquery_test) AS subquery WHERE test_id > 0;
